title: changer, Andhra to soon produce quantum computers for world: Chandrababu Naidu
description: Speaking at the 11th Raisina Dialogue here, Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister N Chandrababu Naidu said artificial intelligence (AI) would soon change the daily lives of people. Naidu also stressed the importance of the demographic dividend to defend Andhra Pradesh's decision to incentivise having more children.

title: UP man booked for sharing 'objectionable' AI video of PM Modi
description: Etah (UP), Mar 7 (PTI) Police in Uttar Pradesh’s Etah district have registered an FIR against a man for allegedly circulating an “objectionable” AI-generated video of Prime Minister Narendra Modi, officials said on Saturday.
